"nesse arquivo eu interrompi o resync enquanto ele sincronizava a biblioteca de cenas

--- MAPEANDO PORTAS MIDI ---
  [IN]  0: Yamaha 01V96-1
  [IN]  1: Yamaha 01V96-2
  [IN]  2: Yamaha 01V96-3
  [IN]  3: Yamaha 01V96-4
  [IN]  4: Yamaha 01V96-5
  [IN]  5: Yamaha 01V96-6
  [IN]  6: Yamaha 01V96-7
  [IN]  7: Yamaha 01V96-8
  [IN]  8: SMC-PAD-bt-2
  [IN]  9: monitor
  [OUT] 0: Microsoft GS Wavetable Synth
  [OUT] 1: Yamaha 01V96-1
  [OUT] 2: Yamaha 01V96-2
  [OUT] 3: Yamaha 01V96-3
  [OUT] 4: Yamaha 01V96-4
  [OUT] 5: Yamaha 01V96-5
  [OUT] 6: Yamaha 01V96-6
  [OUT] 7: Yamaha 01V96-7
  [OUT] 8: Yamaha 01V96-8
  [OUT] 9: SMC-PAD-bt-2
  [OUT] 10: monitor

====================================================
ًںڑ€ BRIDGE MIDI ATIVO (SysEx Reassembly)
   YAMAHA  IN:0  OUT:1
   MONITOR IN:9  OUT:10
====================================================

âœ… [FILTER] 3 prefixos carregados.
